languages.text: "Я приложу все усилия, чтобы твои люди получили достойное обращение и приемлемые условия".
"I will make every effort to ensure your people are treated with dignity and provided with adequate living conditions."
languages.original_text: "Я приложу все усилия, чтобы твои люди получили достойное обращение и приемлемые условия".

traits.locale_text: "I will make every effort to ensure your people are treated with dignity and provided with adequate living conditions."
"I will make every effort to ensure your people are treated with dignity and provided with adequate living conditions."
"The world is unfair. But it is within our gift to make it a little better."
"I will make every effort to ensure your people are treated with dignity and provided with adequate living conditions."
"I will make every effort to ensure your people are treated with dignity and provided with adequate living conditions."

languages.text: 「世界は不公平だ。でも、私たちはそれを少し良くする力を持っている」
languages.original_text: "The world is unfair. But it is within our gift to make it a little better."

languages.text: "Halkınıza haysiyetle davranılmasını ve onlara yeterli yaşam koşullarının sağlanmasını garanti etmek için her türlü çabayı göstereceğim."
languages.original_text: "I will make every effort to ensure your people are treated with dignity and provided with adequate living conditions."

traits.locale_text: "Halkınıza haysiyetle davranılmasını ve onlara yeterli yaşam koşullarının sağlanmasını garanti etmek için her türlü çabayı göstereceğim."

languages.text: “我会竭尽全力，确保你的人得到尊重，并拥有体面的生活条件。”
languages.original_text: "I will make every effort to ensure your people are treated with dignity and provided with adequate living conditions."

traits.locale_text: “我会竭尽全力，确保你的人得到尊重，并拥有体面的生活条件。”

languages.text: "Ich werde alles tun, damit Eure Leute würdevoll behandelt und angemessen untergebracht werden."
languages.original_text: "I will make every effort to ensure your people are treated with dignity and provided with adequate living conditions."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde alles tun, damit Eure Leute würdevoll behandelt und angemessen untergebracht werden."

languages.text: « Je ferai tout mon possible pour que votre peuple soit traité avec dignité et vive dans de bonnes conditions. »
languages.original_text: "I will make every effort to ensure your people are treated with dignity and provided with adequate living conditions."

traits.locale_text: « Je ferai tout mon possible pour que votre peuple soit traité avec dignité et vive dans de bonnes conditions. »

languages.text: «Haré todo lo posible para asegurar que su gente recibe un trato digno y unas condiciones de vida apropiadas».
languages.original_text: "I will make every effort to ensure your people are treated with dignity and provided with adequate living conditions."

traits.locale_text: «Haré todo lo posible para asegurar que su gente recibe un trato digno y unas condiciones de vida apropiadas».
